title: Hex API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don't need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Hex personal access token detected. Hex personal access tokens (prefixed with 'hxtp_') provide authenticated access to the Hex API on behalf of a user. Exposing this token could allow unauthorized access to Hex projects, workspaces, and sensitive data. Revoke the token immediately and store it securely using a secrets manager.

Hex workspace token detected. Hex workspace tokens (prefixed with 'hxtw_') are admin-scoped tokens that can be configured to never expire and can have broad permissions across a Hex workspace. Exposing this token could allow unauthorized access to all workspace projects, user/group management, and data connections. Revoke the token immediately and store it securely using a secrets manager.
